name: Olive Garden Chicken Marsala
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, salt, and oregano in a shallow dish and mix well.
2. Heat oil and butter in a skillet over medium heat until bubbling lightly.
3. Dredge each chicken piece in the seasoned flour mixture, shaking off excess.
4. Cook the chicken on medium heat for about 2 minutes on the first side, until lightly browned.
5. As you turn the chicken to the second side, add mushrooms around the pieces.
6. Cook the chicken an additional 2 minutes on the second side until lightly browned.
7. Stir in the mushrooms and simmer for about 10 more minutes with the wine, covered.
Source: The Olive Garden.
